api_key.description: Klaviyo private API key. Sent as the Authorization header ("Klaviyo-API-Key <key>"); never logged.

base_url.description: Klaviyo API base URL override for tests or proxies.

revision.description: Klaviyo API revision (date-versioned); sent as the revision header.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
